item.description: - Refreshed the About and software update windows with a cleaner, simpler look. - The "All Notes" menu now shows a small dot for every note — filled when the note is open on screen, and an outline when it's closed. - Note titles in the menu now use the full width instead of cutting off early. - The delete button in the menu bar notes list stays neatly in place when you hover.

- Delete a note straight from the menu bar — hover over a note in the list and click the trash icon. - Added "Launch at startup" so CueNow opens automatically when you log in to your Mac. - Added an optional Error logging setting that records app activity to help troubleshoot issues. - Notes set to fully transparent now stay slightly visible so you can always find them. - The active-note dot in the menu bar now matches your Mac's accent color. - The Settings window now tucks away with Stage Manager like a normal app window. - Made the toggles in Settings smaller and tidier.

- Fixed an issue where typed text could be invisible in notes on some Macs. - Added a translucent (glass) note style — choose Solid or Glass in Settings. - Redesigned the App Updates tab and made release notes easier to read. - CueNow now checks for updates automatically and shows what's new. - Added numbered lists; type "1." or "1)" to start one. - Create checklists by typing "- " (hyphen and space). - Improved checklist editing: cleaner deletes and automatic renumbering. - Apply bold, italic, or underline before you start typing. - Added an option to hide CueNow's Dock icon and run from the menu bar.
